changeSet.author: nicolas
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_tenant_log_opt_type_date ON tenant_log (operator_id, log_type, creation_date);

changeSet.author: nicolas
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_latest_operator_tenant_id ON latest_operator (tenant_id);

changeSet.author: nicolas
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_ranked_tenant_tid ON ranked_tenant (tid);

changeSet.author: nicolas
nicolas
changeSet.sql: CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pg_trgm;

changeSet.author: nicolas
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE tenant ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS search_text VARCHAR (255);

changeSet.author: nicolas
changeSet.sql: UPDATE tenant t SET search_text = lower( CASE WHEN t.owner_type = 'THIRD_PARTY' THEN concat_ws(' ', nullif(trim(t.tenant_first_name), ''), nullif(trim(t.tenant_last_name), '') ) ELSE concat_ws(' ', nullif(trim(ua.first_name), ''), nullif(trim(ua.last_name), '') ) END ) FROM user_account ua WHERE t.id = ua.id;

changeSet.author: nicolas
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_tenant_search_text_trgm ON tenant USING gin (search_text gin_trgm_ops);
